template.name: Permanent that can be cast using {C}
template.scryfallQuery: mv<=1 (mana={0} or mana={1} or mana={C}) is:permanent

almostIncluded.description:
Activate Sol Ring by tapping it, adding {C} {C}.
Cast the permanent that can be cast using {C} by paying its mana cost.
Hullbreaker Horror triggers, returning Sol Ring from the battlefield to your hand.
Cast Sol Ring by paying {1}. 
Hullbreaker Horror triggers, returning the permanent cast in step 2 from the battlefield to your hand.
Repeat.
If the permanent can be cast by paying {0}, this combo nets infinite colorless mana.

Cast Sol Ring by paying {1}.
Displacer Kitten triggers, blinking Teferi.
Activate Sol Ring by tapping it, adding {C}{C}.
Activate Teferi's second loyalty ability by removing three loyalty counters from it, returning Sol Ring from the battlefield to your hand and drawing a card.
Repeat.

Cast Sol Ring by paying its mana cost.
Tidespout Tyrant triggers, returning a nontoken permanent that can be cast using {C} from the battlefield to your hand.
Activate Sol Ring by tapping it, adding {C}{C}.
Cast the nontoken permanent returned in step 2 by paying its mana cost.
Tidespout Tyrant triggers, returning Sol Ring from the battlefield to your hand.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You control a nontoken permanent that can be cast using {C}.

template.name: Extra Turn Spell
template.scryfallQuery: o:take o:"extra turn" -o:"lose the game" (t:instant or t:sorcery) -o:"temporal extortion" -o:"flip a coin" -o:"time or knowledge" -o:"if an opponent"

almostIncluded.description:
Cast the extra turn spell by paying its mana cost.
Holding priority, activate Isochron Scepter by paying {2} and tapping it, casting a copy of Narset's Reversal.
Resolve the copy of Narset's Reversal, causing you to copy the extra turn spell, and return the original extra turn spell to your hand.
Resolve the copy of the extra turn spell, causing you to take at least one extra turn after this one.
Repeat each turn.
almostIncluded.manaNeeded: {2} plus enough mana to cast the extra turn spell each turn

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Approach of the Second Sun by paying {6}{W}, causing you to gain seven life and put Approach of the Second Sun into your library seventh from the top.
Cast Windfall by paying {2}{U}, causing each player to discard their hand and draw at least seven cards.
Cast Approach of the Second Sun by paying {6}{W}, causing you to win the game.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You have at least nine cards in hand, or an opponent has at least seven cards in hand.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Chain of Smog by paying {1}{B}, targeting yourself.
Professor Onyx triggers, causing each opponent to lose 2 life and you to gain 2 life.
Resolve Chain of Smog, discarding two cards if possible, then copying the spell without choosing a new target.
Repeat from step 2.

Cast the instant or sorcery spell.
Holding priority, cast Narset's Reversal by paying {U}{U}, targeting the instant or sorcery spell.
Holding priority, activate twinning staff by paying {7} targeting Narset's Reversal, copying Narset's Reversal twice.
Resolve one copy of Narset's Reversal targeting another copy of Narset's Reversal, copying it twice and returning the targeted copy to your hand.
Repeat step 4.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
an instant or sorcery spell in hand.
Mana available to cast the instant or sorcery spell.

feature.name: Infinite copies of instant and sorcery spells on the stack

almostIncluded.description:
Cast any other instant or sorcery spell by paying its mana cost.
Storm-Kiln Artist triggers, as well as Thousand-Year Storm if you've cast another instant and/or sorcery spell this turn.
Resolve the Storm-Kiln Artist trigger, creating a Treasure artifact token.
Resolve the Thousand-Year Storm trigger, if applicable, copying the spell at least once.
Storm-Kiln Artist triggers for each copy made this way, creating that many Treasure artifact tokens.
Resolve each copy of the instant or sorcery.
Holding priority, activate two Treasures by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {U}{U}.
Cast Narset's Reversal by paying {U}{U}, targeting the spell cast in step 1.
Thousand-Year Storm and Storm-Kiln Artist trigger.
Resolve the Storm-Kiln Artist trigger, creating a Treasure artifact token.
Resolve the Thousand-Year Storm trigger, creating at least one copy of Narset's Reversal, with each copy targeting the original Narset's Reversal.
Storm-Kiln Artist triggers for each copy made this way, creating that many Treasure artifact tokens.
Resolve the first copy of Narset's Reversal, copying Narset's Reversal with the copy targeting the spell cast in step 1, and then returning the original Narset's Reversal to your hand.
All remaining Narset's Reversal copies made in step 11 fizzle due to having no legal target.
Storm-Kiln Artist triggers, creating a Treasure artifact token.
Resolve the Narset's Reversal copy from step 13, copying the spell it is targeting and returning the original spell to your hand.
Storm-Kiln Artist triggers, creating a Treasure artifact token.
Resolve the copy of the spell.
Activate any number of Treasures by tapping and sacrificing them, adding enough mana to cast the additional instant or sorcery.
Repeat.
Once you have infinite mana, you may repeat this combo targeting any other instant and/or sorcery card in your hand and/or on the stack.
almostIncluded.manaNeeded: {U} if you have not cast an instant or sorcery this turn
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have another instant and/or sorcery card in hand that can be cast using X or less colored mana, where X is equal to four plus twice the number of instants and sorceries you've cast this turn.
You have enough mana to cast the additional instant or sorcery, plus an additional

almostIncluded.description:
Give Boros Reckoner lifelink.
Cast Boros Charm by paying {R}{W}, giving permanents you control indestructible until end of turn.
Deal damage to Boros Reckoner.
Boros Reckoner triggers, dealing that much damage to itself and causing you to gain that much life.
Repeat step 4 any number of times.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have a way to give Boros Reckoner lifelink.
You have a way to deal damage to Boros Reckoner.

almostIncluded.description: Cast Peer into the Abyss by paying {4}{B}{B}{B}, causing you to lose half your life total rounded up and draw your library due to Alhammarret's Archive.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
Your life total is at least 2.
Your deck size is even.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast any instant or sorcery spell by paying its mana cost.
Holding priority, cast Reiterate by paying {1}{R}{R}, targeting the spell.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers, copying Reiterate at least once, targeting the original Reiterate.
Resolve the first copy of Reiterate, copying Reiterate targeting the original Reiterate.
Repeat step 4.
almostIncluded.manaNeeded: {1}{R}{R} plus enough mana to cast the additional instant or sorcery
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You have at least one other instant or sorcery card in hand that can be cast this turn.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Approach of the Second Sun for {6}{W}.
Holding priority, cast Narset's Reversal by paying {U}{U} targeting Approach of the Second Sun, copying Approach of the Second Sun and then returning Approach of the Second Sun to your hand.
Resolve the copied Approach of the Second Sun, gaining seven life.
Cast Approach of the Second Sun for {6}{W}, winning the game.

feature.name: Infinite draw triggers for all players
Infinite self-discard triggers for all players

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Windfall from your graveyard for its escape cost by paying {2}{U} and exiling three cards from your graveyard, causing each player to discard at least three cards and draw at least three cards.
Smothering Tithe triggers for each card drawn by your opponents, creating that many Treasure tokens.
Activate three of the Treasure tokens by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {2}{U}.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
A player has at least three cards in hand.
There are at least three additional cards in your graveyard.
At least one opponent is unable to pay for Smothering Tithe's trigger.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Approach of the Second Sun by paying {6}{W}, causing you to gain 7 life and put Approach of the Second Sun into your library seventh from the top.
Cast Solve the Equation by paying {U}, searching your library for Approach of the Second Sun and putting it into your hand.
Cast Approach of the Second Sun by paying {6}{W}, causing you to win the game.

Each time an opponent draws a card, Smothering Tithe triggers.
Opponents will eventually be unable to pay for Smothering Tithe due to Statis causing them to skip their untap steps, causing you to create a Treasure artifact token.
At the beginning of your upkeep, Stasis triggers.
Holding priority, activate a Treasure token by tapping and sacrificing it, adding {U}.
Resolve the Stasis ability, paying {U}.
Repeat.

Cast the buyback spell with buyback by paying its mana cost plus its buyback cost.
Displacer Kitten triggers, blinking Dockside Extortionist.
When Dockside Extortionist enters the battlefield, it triggers, creating a number of Treasure artifact tokens equal to the number of artifacts and/or enchantments opponents control.
Resolve the buyback spell, performing its listed effect and returning it to your hand.
Activate a Treasure by tapping and sacrificing it, adding one mana of any color.
Repeat step 5 until you have enough mana to cast the buyback spell with buyback.
Repeat from step 1.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have enough mana to cast the buyback spell with buyback.
Opponents control a number of artifacts and/or enchantments equal to or greater than one plus the number of Treasure tokens that would be required to cast the buyback spell with buyback.
There are legal targets for the buyback spell, if applicable.

feature.name: Cast any spell of your choice from your library
Infinite cast triggers for all spells in your library

almostIncluded.description:
Cast any noncreature spell, paying its costs.
Neera and Displacer Kitten trigger, as do any Storm abilities or other cast triggers of the spell.
Resolve Displacer Kitten's ability, blinking Neera.
Resolve Neera's ability, putting the spell you cast on the bottom of your library, revealing cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card, casting that card without paying its mana cost, and putting the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.
Repeat from step 2 any number of times, until you choose to resolve a spell in step 4.
Resolve all cast triggers created in step 2.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
An additional noncreature nonland card in hand.
Every nonland card in library can be cast as a noncreature spell with valid targets.
Enough mana available to cast the noncreature nonland card in hand.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Brass's Bounty by paying {6}{R}.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers, creating a copy of Brass's Bounty for each instant and sorcery spell cast before it this turn.
Resolve the first copy of Brass's Bounty, if applicable, creating a Treasure artifact token for each land you control.
Repeat step 3 for each remaining copy, if applicable.
If you created Treasures this way, activate two Treasures by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {U}{U}.
Holding priority, cast Narset's Reversal by paying {U}{U}, targeting the original Brass's Bounty.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers, creating a copy of Narset's Reversal for each instant and sorcery spell cast before it this turn, with each copy targeting the original Narset's Reversal.
Resolve the first copy of Narset's Reversal, copying the original Narset's Reversal targeting Brass's Bounty, then returning the original Narset's Reversal to your hand.
All remaining Narset's Reversal copies made in step 7 fizzle due to having no legal target.
Resolve the Narset's Reversal copy made in step 8, copying Brass's Bounty and returning the original Brass's Bounty to your hand.
Resolve the copy of Brass's Bounty, creating a Treasure artifact token for each land you control.
Activate seven Treasures by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {6}{R}.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.manaNeeded: {6}{R}, plus an additional {U}{U} available if you have not cast an instant or sorcery this turn
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You control at least seven lands.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast a copy of Seething Song by paying {2}{R}.
Displacer Kitten triggers, blinking Blazing Firesinger. It'll enter prepared due to its effect.
Resolve Seething Song, adding {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}.
Repeat.

feature.name: Exile all cards in hands and graveyards

template.name: Instant or Sorcery that deals damage or causes lifeloss to each opponent
template.scryfallQuery: (o:deal o:damage or o:lose o:life) (o:"to each opponent" or o:"each opponent loses") (t:instant or t:sorcery) -o:"if you control a"

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Mizzix's Mastery for its overload cost by paying {5}{R}{R}{R}, exiling each instant and sorcery card in your graveyard and casting them without paying their mana costs.
Resolve the copy of Worldfire, exiling all permanents, all cards in all hands and graveyards, and setting each player's life total to 1.
Resolve the copy of the instant or sorcery that deals damage or causes lifeloss, causing each opponent to lose at least 1 life or be dealt at least 1 damage.
Each opponent loses the game due to having 0 or less life.

feature.name: Infinite untap of creatures you control

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Turnabout.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers.
Allow any Turnabout copies to resolve, maintaining the original.
Cast Narset's Reversal targeting Turnabout.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers.
Have at least one copy of Narset's Reversal target the original Narset's Reversal.
When that copy of Narset's Reversal resolves, target the original Turnabout with the new copy of Narset's Reversal created.
When that new copy of Narset's Reversal to resolves, target yourself with the copy of Turnabout.
When it resolves, untap all lands (or artifacts, or creatures) you control.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: Lands (or artifacts, or creatures) sufficient to produce {2}{U}{U}{U}{U}.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast your additional instant or sorcery spell, or wait for an opponent to cast one.
Professor Onyx triggers, losing each opponent two life and gaining you 2 life.
Cast Fury Storm targeting the instant or sorcery spell.
Professor Onyx triggers, losing each opponent two life and gaining you 2 life.
Fury Storm triggers, copying itself for each time you have cast your commander from your command zone this game and choosing the original copy of Fury Storm as the target.
Professor Onyx triggers for each copy, losing each opponent two life and gaining you 2 life each time.
Resolve a Fury Storm copy, copying Fury Storm and choosing the original Fury Storm as the target.
Professor Onyx triggers, losing each opponent two life and gaining you 2 life.
Repeat from step 7.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have cast your commander from your command zone this game.
An additional instant or sorcery in hand with the mana to cast it, or an opponent has cast an as of yet unresolved instant or sorcery spell.

feature.name: Infinite copies of all instants and sorceries with mana value 6 or less in your hand and graveyard

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Invoke Calamity by paying {1}{R}{R}{R}{R}.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers, copying Invoke Calamity a number of times equal to the number of other instants and sorceries you have cast this turn.
Resolve all but two of the copies of Invoke Calamity and the original Invoke Calamity, choosing not to cast any instant or sorcery spells as they resolve.
Resolve a copy of Invoke Calamity, casting Narset's Reversal without paying its mana cost.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers, copying Narset's Reversal a number of times equal to the number of other instants and sorceries you have cast this turn, targeting the original Narset's Reversal with the first copy of Narset's Reversal and targeting the original Invoke Calamity with all other copies of Narset's Reversal.
Resolve a copy of Narset's Reversal, copying the original Invoke Calamity and returning it to your hand.
Resolve the newly copied Invoke Calamity, choosing not to cast any instant or sorcery spells as it resolves.
Each remaining copy of Narset's Reversal that was targeting the original Invoke Calamity fails to resolve due to no longer having a legal target.
Resolve the copy of Narset's Reversal targeting the original Narset's Reversal, copying it and returning it to your hand.
Resolve the newly copied Narset's Reversal, copying the remaining copy of Invoke Calamity and returning it to your hand.
Resolve the copied Invoke Calamity, casting Invoke Calamity without paying its mana cost.
Repeat from step 2 an arbitrarily large number of times.
Once you have done so, you may choose to cast any number of instants or sorceries from your hand or graveyard with mana value six or less without paying their mana costs during step 3.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You have cast at least one instant or sorcery spell this turn.

feature.name: Near-infinite casts of instants and sorceries in your opponents' graveyards

almostIncluded.description:
Activate The Chain Veil by paying {4} and tapping it, allowing an additional activation of each of your planeswalkers' loyalty abilities this turn.
Activate Tasha's first loyalty ability by putting a loyalty counter on it, causing you to draw a card and exile an instant and/or sorcery card from an opponent's graveyard with a page counter on it.
Activate Tasha's second loyalty ability by removing three loyalty counters from it, casting an instant or sorcery spell with a page counter on it from exile.
Displacer Kitten and Tasha trigger.
Resolve the Tasha trigger, creating a 3/3 Demon creature token.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Tasha.
Resolve the instant or sorcery spell.
Repeat from step 2.
Note that you must abide by targeting restrictions when casting the instant or sorcery spell, and so not all instants and/or sorceries in your opponent' graveyards may work for this combo.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
Tasha has at least three loyalty counters on it.
An opponent has an instant and/or sorcery in their graveyard.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast a copy of Craft With Pride by paying {R}.
Displacer Kitten triggers, blinking Goblin Glasswright, which enters prepared.
Resolve Craft With Pride, creating a Treasure token.
Activate that Treasure token by tapping and sacrificing it, adding {R}.
Repeat.

almostIncluded.notes: You can start this loop by casting Chancellor of the Spires and resolving its ETB ability instead, and then follow the above instructions for every subsequent loop.

feature.name: Near-infinite casts of instant and sorcery cards in opponents' graveyards

almostIncluded.description:
Cast any noncreature spell by casting its mana cost.
Displacer Kitten triggers, blinking Chancellor of the Spires.
When Chancellor of the Spires enters the battlefield, it triggers, causing you to cast an instant or sorcery from an opponent's graveyard without paying its mana cost.
Repeat from step 2 for each remaining instant and/or sorcery card in each opponent's graveyard that you wish to cast.
Resolve all spells on the stack.
You may repeat this loop whenever you cast a noncreature spell.
almostIncluded.easyPrerequisites:
An opponent has an instant or sorcery in their graveyard.
You have a noncreature spell in hand with the mana to cast it.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast any other instant card from your hand by paying its mana cost.
Holding priority, cast Spelljack by paying {3}{U}{U}{U} targeting the instant.
Thousand-Year Storm triggers, creating at least one copy of Spelljack that is targeting the original Spelljack.
Resolve the first copy of Spelljack, countering the original Spelljack and exiling it with the ability to cast it for free from exile.
All remaining copies of Spelljack fail to resolve due to having no legal targets.
Cast Spelljack from exile without paying its mana cost, targeting the instant cast in Step 1.
Repeat from step 3.
almostIncluded.manaNeeded: {3}{U}{U}{U} plus enough mana to cast the additional instant card
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites: You have an additional instant card in hand.

feature.name: Near-infinite mana lands you control can produce

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Frantic Search by paying {2}{U}.
Chandra and Displacer Kitten triggers.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Chandra.
Resolve the Chandra trigger, creating a copy of Frantic Search.
Resolve the copy of Frantic Search, looting twice and untapping three lands you control that can tap to produce at least {1}{U}{U}.
Activate the three lands by tapping them, adding at least {1}{U}{U}.
Holding priority, cast Narset's Reversal by paying {U}{U}, targeting Frantic Search.
 Chandra and Displacer Kitten triggers.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Chandra.
Resolve the Chandra trigger, creating a copy of Narset's Reversal, targeting the original Narset's Reversal.
Resolve the Narset's Reversal copy, creating a copy of the original Narset's Reversal targeting Frantic Search and returning the original Narset's Reversal to your hand.
Resolve Narset's Reversal, creating a copy of Frantic Search and returning it to your hand.
Resolve Frantic Search, looting twice and untapping three lands you control that can tap to produce at least {1}{U}{U}.
Activate the three lands by tapping them, adding at least {1}{U}{U}.
Activate Chandra's third loyalty ability by removing four loyalty counters from it, dealing four damage to up to two targets.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You control three lands that can tap to produce at least {1}{U}{U}.
You have not copied a spell using Chandra this turn.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast Brass's Bounty by paying {6}{R}.
Chandra and Displacer Kitten triggers.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Chandra.
Resolve the Chandra trigger, creating a copy of Brass's Bounty.
Resolve the Brass's Bounty copy, creating at least five Treasure tokens.
Activate two of the Treasure tokens by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {U}{U}.
Holding priority, cast Narset's Reversal by paying {U}{U}, targeting Brass's Bounty.
Chandra and Displacer Kitten triggers.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Chandra.
Resolve the Chandra trigger, creating a copy of Narset's Reversal, targeting the original Narset's Reversal.
Resolve the Narset's Reversal copy, creating a copy of the original Narset's Reversal targeting Brass's Bounty and returning the original Narset's Reversal to your hand.
Resolve Narset's Reversal, creating a copy of Brass's Bounty and returning it to your hand.
Resolve Brass's Bounty, creating at least five Treasure tokens.
Activate seven Treasure tokens by tapping and sacrificing them, adding {6}{R}.
Activate Chandra's third loyalty ability by removing four loyalty counters from it, dealing four damage to up to two targets.
Repeat.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You control at least five lands.
You have not copied a spell using Chandra this turn.

feature.name: Infinite copies of one instant or sorcery

template.name: Instant or Sorcery that untaps a Creature
template.scryfallQuery: (t:instant or t:sorcery) o:"untap " (o:creature -o:"nonlegendary creature" or o:permanent -o:"noncreature permanent") -o:destroy

almostIncluded.description:
Cast the instant or sorcery by paying its mana cost.
Holding priority, activate Stella Lee by tapping it, copying the instant or sorcery.
Resolve the copy of the instant or sorcery, untapping Stella Lee.
Repeat from step 2.
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have cast at least two spells this turn.
Stella Lee does not have summoning sickness.
You have enough mana to cast the instant or sorcery card.
You have additional legal target(s) for the instant or sorcery card, if applicable.

almostIncluded.description:
Cast any other instant or sorcery card from your hand by paying its mana cost.
Chandra and Displacer Kitten triggers.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Chandra.
Resolve the Chandra trigger, creating a copy of the instant or sorcery.
Holding priority, cast Spelljack by paying {3}{U}{U}{U}, targeting the instant or sorcery cast in step 1.
Chandra and Displacer Kitten triggers.
Resolve the Displacer Kitten trigger, blinking Chandra.
Resolve the Chandra trigger, creating a copy of Spelljack that is targeting the original Spelljack.
Resolve the copy of Spelljack, countering the original Spelljack and exiling it with the ability to cast it for free from exile.
Cast Spelljack from exile without paying its mana cost, targeting the instant or sorcery cast in step 1.
Repeat from step 6.
almostIncluded.manaNeeded: {3}{U}{U}{U} plus enough mana to cast the additional instant or sorcery card
almostIncluded.notablePrerequisites:
You have an additional instant or sorcery card in hand.
You have not copied a spell using Chandra this turn.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Declare Jumbo Cactuar as an attacker, triggering its ability, giving it +9999/+0 until end of turn.
Cast Swords to Plowshares by paying {W}, exiling Jumbo Cactuar and causing you to gain 10,000 life.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.easyPrerequisites: Jumbo Cactuar does not have summoning sickness.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.notes: Only Equipment whose equip cost costs three or less mana and that do not give shroud will function with this combo. If the Equipment costs two or less, this combo nets infinite colored mana, and you may instead cast any other cards permitted by Garth One-Eye except Shivan Dragon.

feature.name: Infinite card draw for any number of players
Infinite draw triggers for any number of players
Infinite copies of a specific artifact
Infinite casts of all spells created by Garth One-Eye except Shivan Dragon

template.name: Equipment That Gives Haste to a Creature

almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Activate the Equipment's equip ability by paying its equip cost, attaching it to Garth One-Eye.
Activate Garth One-Eye by tapping it, causing you to pay {0} to cast a copy of Black Lotus without paying its mana cost.
Displacer Kitten triggers, blinking Garth One-Eye.
Activate the Black Lotus token by tapping and sacrificing it, adding three mana of any color.
Repeat.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.notablePrerequisites: You have enough mana to pay for the Equipment's equip ability if the Equipment is not already attached to Garth One-Eye.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Cast Chain of Acid for {3}{G} targeting an indestructible noncreature permanent you control.
Professor Onyx triggers, causing each opponent to lose 2 life and you to gain 2 life.
Resolve Chain of Acid, failing to destroy the target and copying Chain of Acid targeting the same permanent.
Repeat from step 2.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.notablePrerequisites: You control an indestructible noncreature permanent.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.notes: The more life you have, the more life your opponents will lose. You can also add mana as desired from other sources to cast Exsanguinate.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Cast a copy of Channel by paying {G}{G}.
Activate the ability granted by Channel by paying 1 life, adding {C}.
Repeat step 2 as desired.
Cast Exsanguinate by paying {B}{B} and all remaining available mana, causing each opponent to lose a significant amount of life and you to gain life equal to the life lost this way.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.notes: The more life you have, the more damage you will deal, and you'll also get more targets to deal damage to. You can also add mana as desired from other sources to cast Crackle with Power.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Cast a copy of Channel by paying {G}{G}.
Activate the ability granted by Channel by paying 1 life, adding {C}.
Repeat step 2 as desired.
Cast Crackle with Power by paying {R}{R} and all remaining available mana, dealing a large amount of damage to a set number of targets.

Play Sprout Storm, copying it 4 times and paying the buyback cost.
Resolve all 5 Sprout Storms.
Make 5 Saprolings.
Tap all the Saprolings to play Sprout Storm, paying the buyback cost.
Make 6 Saprolings.
Repeat, making more and more Saprolings and increasing your storm count.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.notablePrerequisites:
You are able to cast Sprout Swarm.
Storm count at least 4.

almostIncludedByAddingColors.notes: Moritte can only be your commander if the sources from both templates fit within its commander identity.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.description:
Cast Moritte either from your hand or from the command zone by paying {2}{G}{U}{U} plus commander tax if applicable. Choose to have it enter as a copy of the persist creature that is still legendary.
Put Moritte into your graveyard due to the legend rule. When it dies, its persist ability triggers, returning it from your graveyard to the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter on it due to its ability. Choose to have it enter as a copy of the persist creature that is still legendary.
Repeat step 2.
almostIncludedByAddingColors.notablePrerequisites: The persist creature is your Ring-bearer.
